programs.title: Family Guy
programs.desc: Anarchic animated sitcom. When Peter protests about Brad Pitt being cast in a biopic about a politician, he ends up in the lead role when the star gets injured on set.

programs.title: Family Guy
programs.desc: Anarchic animated sitcom. When Meg finds that her tears make cookies delicious, she starts a business based on the discovery with Brian, Stewie and Chris as her backers.

programs.title: American Dad!
programs.desc: Stan goes head-to-head with Roger when he starts stealing birds' eggs. Plus, Francine tries new Italian cooking sauce.

programs.title: American Dad!
programs.desc: Stan and Steve open up their own father-son garbage business after Stan inherits his father's old truck. Plus, Roger discovers Hayley is a natural at bumper pool.

programs.title: Bob's Burgers
programs.desc: Animated comedy. When a deep and long-standing feud on Linda's side of the family re-emerges on Mother's Day, the kids team up with Gayle to try to settle things.

programs.title: Bob's Burgers
programs.desc: Animated comedy. Louise adopts a spider and discovers that keeping it around the Belcher home is a complicated matter, and Bob reconnects with old friends.
